message:
Add comprehensive beads for all reference library components

Created 4 new epics and 41 new tasks covering all widgets, renderables,
and core systems from the three reference libraries:

- bd-6e9: Bubbles Widget Collection (charmed_rust port)
  - TextArea, FilePicker, Help, Paginator, Stopwatch, Timer
  - Cursor utilities, runeutil grapheme helpers

- bd-3bp: Rich Renderables Collection (rich_rust port)
  - Align, Columns, Emoji, Group, JSON, Layout, Padding, Panel
  - Pretty, Rule, Traceback, Tree

- bd-3ky: OpenTUI Core Systems (opentui_rust port)
  - ANSI sequence generator, Buffer drawing operations
  - Syntax tokenizer, highlight themes, language tokenizers
  - Text Rope, Editor core, View
  - Unicode bidi, normalization, search
  - Terminal raw mode, queries, threaded renderer

- bd-1ho: Rich Core Infrastructure (rich_rust port)
  - Segment system, Console abstraction, Measurement protocol
  - Box drawing, Live display, filesize formatter, logging

All beads include:
- Detailed API designs from reference implementations
- Implementation notes and considerations
- Proper dependency relationships (no cycles)
- Reference file paths for source material

Total beads: 141 with 114 blocked (proper dependency ordering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
